text.en: Bayesian networks gave AI a compact language for uncertain reasoning. A directed graph encodes dependencies among variables, while conditional probability tables quantify how evidence should change beliefs. The idea became central to diagnosis, sensor fusion, decision support, and later causal modeling.
text.zh: 贝叶斯网络为 AI 提供了一种紧凑的不确定推理语言。有向图编码变量之间的依赖关系，条件概率表量化证据如何改变信念。这个思想成为诊断、传感器融合、决策支持和后来的因果建模的核心。

text.en: Directed acyclic graph plus conditional probabilities
text.zh: 有向无环图加条件概率
